title: Ethereum Everywhere Santiago Palladino - Devconnect
description:
Speaker: Santiago Palladino
Event: Ethereum Day (Devconnect Argentina 2025)  
Keywords: Ethereum, decentralization, Argentina, crypto community, global innovation

Ethereum, Everywhere (All at Once)
Ethereum's impact goes beyond the strictly technical or financial. The decentralization ethos nurtures and defines its community, as shown by hosting its main conference in this corner of the world, and opens the door to communities regardless of their location or area of expertise. In this talk, I'll go through the impact of Ethereum in Argentina and vice-versa, and reflect on ten years of this movement that transcends technology by uniting developers, artists, economists, and dreamers. As Devconnect lands in Buenos Aires, we'll explore how this gathering can bridge the local and global, and how can we all make the most of this week together to plan for the next years.

About Devconnect  
Devconnect is a week-long gathering of the Ethereum community with events for developers, researchers, artists and creators. It’s organized by the Ethereum Foundation and took place in Buenos Aires, Argentina in Nov 2025, with ~20,000 attendees. 

What’s next  
The next major Ethereum community event is Devcon 8, happening in 2026. 
For updates visit: https://devcon.org

More  
Follow us: @efdevcon · @ethereum 
Learn more about Ethereum: https://ethereum.org
And the Ethereum Foundation: https://ethereum.foundation/
